basics.product_tags: Purix veg gelatine, veg gelatine 75 gm, vegetarian gelatine, dessert setting agent, bakery gelling ingredient, pudding setting ingredient, jelly setting ingredient, foodservice bakery ingredient
basics.description:
Purix Veg Gelatine 75 gm VE634 is a vegetarian gelatine-style ingredient used for setting and thickening desserts, jellies, puddings, custards, jams, soups and selected bakery preparations.

It is suitable for bakeries, cafés, hotels, cloud kitchens, dessert counters and foodservice kitchens that need a small-pack gelling ingredient for controlled recipe preparation and texture support.

Purix Veg Gelatine 75 gm VE634 can be used in hot liquid preparations and then cooled for setting, making it useful for dessert layers, fruit gel preparations, marshmallow-style items, pudding bases and other kitchen applications.
basics.short_description: Purix Veg Gelatine 75 gm VE634 is a vegetarian gelatine-style bakery and dessert ingredient for setting and thickening jellies, puddings, custards, fruit gelatin, jams, soups and dessert preparations. It is useful for bakeries, cafés, hotels, cloud kitchens and foodservice kitchens that need controlled texture support in small-batch preparation.

basics.product_name: Purix Gel Cold Glazed 2.5 Kg GE432
basics.product_tags: Purix gel cold glazed, cold glaze 2.5 kg, neutral cold glaze, cake glaze, pastry glaze, bakery topping gel, dessert glaze, foodservice bakery glaze
basics.description:
Purix Gel Cold Glazed 2.5 Kg GE432 is a ready-to-use cold glaze for coating or topping cakes, pastries, confectionery and sweet bakery products with a finished surface.

The 2.5 kg pack is practical for bakeries, cafés, hotels, dessert counters, cloud kitchens and foodservice kitchens that need glaze for repeated cake and pastry preparation.

Purix Gel Cold Glazed 2.5 Kg GE432 helps create a neat gloss on desserts and baked goods without complex preparation. It is useful for fruit tarts, pastries, cakes, mousse desserts and display items that need a clean neutral glaze finish.
basics.short_description: Purix Gel Cold Glazed 2.5 Kg GE432 is a ready-to-use neutral cold glaze for cakes, pastries, confectionery, fruit tarts, mousse desserts and bakery display items. The 2.5 kg pack is suitable for bakeries, cafés, hotels, dessert counters, cloud kitchens and foodservice kitchens handling regular glazing and topping work.
